mapper.insert: insert into ai_conversation ( id, conversation_id, user_id, user_code, title, status, context_snapshot, message_count, created_at, updated_at, last_message_at, deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, #{title}, 'ACTIVE', #{contextSnapshot, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0 ) on duplicate key update title = if(title is null or title = '' or title = '新会话', values(title), title), status = if(status = 'DELETED', 'ACTIVE', status), context_snapshot = coalesce(values(context_snapshot), context_snapshot), updated_at = current_timestamp, last_message_at = current_timestamp, deleted = 0
mapper.update: update ai_conversation set context_snapshot = #{contextSnapshot, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, message_count = ( select count(1) from ai_conversation_message m where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and m.deleted = 0 ), updated_at = current_timestamp, last_message_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and
mapper.sql:
where
and status = #{status}
and status = 'ACTIVE'
and ( title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or context_snapshot like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or exists ( select 1 from ai_conversation_message m where m.conversation_id = ai_conversation.conversation_id and m.deleted = 0 and m.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
mapper.select:
select conversation_id as conversationId, title, status, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt, date_format(archived_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as archivedAt, message_count as messageCount, context_snapshot as contextSnapshot from ai_conversation
order by coalesce(last_message_at, updated_at, created_at) desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select conversation_id as conversationId, title, status, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt, date_format(archived_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as archivedAt, message_count as messageCount, context_snapshot as contextSnapshot from ai_conversation where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and limit 1

select message_id as messageId, role, content, status, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as time, trace_id as traceId, operation_id as operationId, login_session_id as loginSessionId from ai_conversation_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0 order by created_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_conversation_message ( id, message_id, conversation_id, user_id, user_code, role, content, status, trace_id, operation_id, login_session_id, tool_summary, citation_summary, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{messageId}, #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, #{role}, #{content}, #{status}, #{traceId}, #{operationId}, #{loginSessionId}, #{toolSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{citationSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0 )
mapper.update: update ai_conversation set status = 'ARCHIVED', archived_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and and status != 'DELETED'
update ai_conversation set status = 'ACTIVE', archived_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and and status = 'ARCHIVED'
update ai_conversation set status = 'DELETED', deleted = 1, deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and
update ai_conversation set status = 'DELETED', deleted = 1, deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where and status = #{status}
